ValidationRule.description: Prevent non-System Administrator users from changing Prescreen Completed when required mailing address fields are missing
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (ISCHANGED( Prescreen_Completed__c ) && TEXT( Prescreen_Completed__c)<> NULL && ( MailingCity = NULL || MailingState = NULL || MailingPostalCode = NULL ) && $Profile.Name <>'System Administrator' && OwnerId ='0053h000002lIA0' ) || (ISCHANGED( Prescreen_Completed__c ) && TEXT( Prescreen_Completed__c)<> NULL && ( MailingCity = NULL || MailingState = NULL || MailingPostalCode = NULL ) && $Profile.Name <>'System Administrator') || ( ISCHANGED( Prescreen_Completed__c ) && TEXT( Prescreen_Completed__c)<> NULL && $Profile.Name <>'System Administrator')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Update Contact Owner and Mailing Address when Prescreen Complete is updated.
